headline: From Lungs To Nasal Polyps: Sanofi Finds Success With 2-in-1 Inflammation Blocker
summary: Sanofi reports positive Phase 2 data for lunsekimig in asthma and nasal polyps, while atopic dermatitis study misses main goal.
